postReview.title: Netherlands 1-2 England: Watkins' dramatic winner sends Three Lions into Euro 2024 final
postReview.description: The second Euro 2024 semi-final appeared to be heading for extra time, but substitute Ollie Watkins' late strike sent England to Berlin.
